title: Prove mutation crash atomicity and idempotency
preconditions: Temporary real SQLite generation with representative facts, history, relationships, and an injectable activation adapter.
steps: Inject termination/failure before and after each SQL commit, artifact flush/publication, manifest write, candidate verification, and CURRENT replacement; restart and replay the same key.
expected: Each restart sees exactly one complete committed effect or unchanged pre-operation state; no partial facts/history/relationships; replay returns the original stable outcome.
